name: smart-notifications
description: macOS desktop notifications for agent events with terminal activation support.

interface.shortDescription: macOS notifications that return you to the right terminal.
interface.longDescription: Adds context-aware desktop notifications for agent events and can reactivate the originating terminal or IDE when you click a notification.
defaultPrompt: Install notification hooks for this workspace.
Explain how the notification click handling works.
Debug why notifications are not appearing on macOS.
